title: Bill
body: Bill is the guy who can build it and make it beautiful — like the butterfly garden trellis everyone stops to photograph. He also keeps our irrigation running so nothing goes thirsty in July. Hand him a problem and a tape measure and step back.

title: Nursery Team
body: The crew behind the green stuff — potting, propagating, watering, and nursing cuttings into sellable plants. They sort and pot donated specimens, keep the benches tidy, and run the plant sales that help fund the park. Good music, good dirt, good company.

title: Karen
body: Karen planned and planted the butterfly garden, trains new volunteers, wrangles field trips, shows up for events, and mentors our Bright Futures students. Mostly she just makes everyone around her better. If there's a job nobody's claimed, she's already three steps into it.

title: Events Committee
body: Plant sales, holiday lights, fundraisers, art shows, cornhole tournaments, family fun nights — if it draws a crowd, this crew built it. They handle the chaos so everyone else gets to enjoy the party. Many hands, light work, lots of laughs.

title: Franky and Randy
role: Bright Futures High School Program, Wednesdays
body: Franky & Randy lead a hands-on volunteer program that gives Bright Futures High School students a meaningful way to put in their three hours a week—digging in the dirt, clearing park debris, planting new additions, pitching in on office work, setting up for park events, and tackling the zillion odd chores that keep a botanical park running.

title: Krystal
body: Krystal gets the word out about our gardens — Chamber of Commerce mixers, Discover Bradenton events, manning the booth at the Public Market, and most recently selling 50/50 tickets at the Garden Party. Thanks for jumping in, Krystal. We appreciate you!

title: Adult Workday
role: Date TBD, but it will be a Tuesday!
body: Come on out for the next adult workday, Tuesday, July2. A good time will be had by all. We will have food and drink. Stay hydrated!
